data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Auto-reminders for incomplete items', but the evidence does not demonstrate that reminders are triggered for all incomplete tasks. While there is a mention of an automated reminder for starting bowel prep, it does not cover the broader requirement of reminders for all incomplete checklist items. This indicates a gap in the evidence regarding the comprehensive implementation of auto-reminders.
gaps: No evidence of auto-reminders for all incomplete checklist items.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for auto-reminders functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that reminders are sent for all incomplete checklist items.
